name: Atlantis Pasila
overview: In the new dramedy by the writer of the beloved series AIKUISET, we follow the employees and patrons of the Atlantis bar, tucked away in the concrete-grey depths of East Pasila. Kauri, Nita, Riku, Iiris, and Anni—twenty- and thirty-somethings—are all trying to get by in life, while also attempting to make at least some sense of the feelings each of them avoids in their own way.

trailers.title: TRAILERI | Atlantis Pasila | Kotimainen komediasarja Yle Areenassa 27.1.2026! 🍸
